title: Spar India Capital India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Spar India Capital India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Spar India Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Spar India Capital India:
Spar India Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spar India Capital India!
